mapper.select: SELECT * FROM coach_profiles WHERE qualification_verified = 0 ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE coach_profiles SET real_name = #{realName}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, avatar = #{avatar}, specialization = #{specialization}, introduction = #{introduction}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM coach_profiles ORDER BY created_at DESC
